intro: Loom Video Scraper is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for media & downloads. How downloadVideo and returnVideoUrl interact: This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: archive online courses and tutorial libraries with searchable transcript databases
backup training materials before expiration and generate study notes automatically
create comprehensive knowledge bases from video content
archive team presentations, meeting recordings, and video communications

faq.q: How do I run Loom Video Scraper?
faq.a: Open Loom Video Scraper on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
Loom Video Scraper runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
